welcome:
🙏 Welcome to Machail Mata Guide
Your official companion for the Machail Mata Yatra. Get instant details about hotels, taxis, weather, and more.
no_places: No tourist attractions listed at the moment.

route_info:
🛣 Machail Mata Route Information

Nearest Airport: Jammu (IXJ)
Nearest Railway: Jammu Tawi/Udhampur

Road Route: Jammu -> Kishtwar -> Gulabgarh (Base Camp) -> Trek/Helicopter to Machail.
temple_desc:
🕉 Machail Mata Temple
Located in the Padder valley of Kishtwar district. The holy shrine is dedicated to Goddess Durga.

guide_welcome:
🎒 *Official Machail Mata Yatra Guide*

Explore essential guides, helicopter bookings, safety checklist, and FAQs below to make your journey safe and smooth.
guide_helicopter_info:
🛸 *Helicopter & Yatra Registration Guide*

*1. Official Helicopter Services*:
• *Route*: Gulabgarh (Base Camp) ⇆ Machail
• *One-way Fare*: Approx. ₹2,300 per passenger
• *Authorized Operators*: UTair India / Global Vectra
• *Online Booking*: Only through Kishtwar District website or official counters at Gulabgarh.

*2. Mandatory Registration*:
• *Medical Certificate*: A compulsory health fitness certificate signed by an authorized CMO/Government doctor is required.
• *Registration Slip*: Obtain the official Yatra Slip at Kishtwar or Gulabgarh registration counters before proceeding on the trek.
guide_packing_info:
🎒 *Yatra Packing Checklist*

Make sure to carry these essentials before leaving base camp:

❄️ *Clothing*:
• Heavy woolens, thermals, gloves, and woolen socks (Night temp drops below 0°C).
• Raincoat or umbrella (Monsoon rain causes sudden trail wetness).

🥾 *Footwear*:
• Sturdy trekking shoes with good grip (Avoid slippers/flat shoes).

🔋 *Electronics & Essentials*:
• *Power Bank*: Trek paths do not have charging points.
• *Cash*: Carrying physical cash is mandatory. ATMs are sparse beyond Kishtwar.

💊 *Medical Pack*:
• Painkillers, bandages, antiseptic cream, and basic fever/altitude medicines.
guide_faqs_info:
❓ *Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)*

*Q: Is mobile network available on the trek?*
💡 *A*: Airtel and Jio have limited network coverage on the trail. BSNL has the most stable connection inside Machail village. Internet (4G) is highly unreliable; finish essential online tasks at Kishtwar.

*Q: Are ATMs available on the trek?*
💡 *A*: The last reliable ATMs are located at Atholi (Gulabgarh). Beyond base camp, only cash is accepted by tents, prasad vendors, and ponies.

*Q: What is the trekking distance?*
💡 *A*: The trek is approximately *30 kilometers* round trip from Gulabgarh to Machail Mata Temple, usually completed in 1 to 2 days. Ponies, palki, and helicopter services are available.
